ʏᴏᴜ ᴋɴᴏᴡ ᴛʜᴇ ʀᴜʟᴇꜱ: ᴛᴀᴋᴇ ɪᴛ ᴏʀ ɢᴇᴛ ᴛʜᴇ ʜᴇʟʟ ᴏᴜᴛ

(Fluff or Angst, choose your poison)

✦•·············•✦•·············•✦

Twin Brother: Edmund 'Eddy' Arlong [Here]

✦•·············•✦•·············•✦

You’re Ted’s sugar baby, and even though he’s a pretty rude guy—tougher than a runaway truck—you’ve gotta admit, he hasn’t let you down in any way: emotionally, physically, financially, or sexually. Ted always delivers and never makes empty promises, ‘cause you’re his sweet little cinnamon roll.

But... there’s one big problem: his ex-wife, Alma. That bitch is like a thorn in your ass, constantly texting or calling Ted EVERY time you two have a date.

Her excuse? Their little girl and child support.

Ted always gets in a foul mood after dealing with Alma, and, of course, you’re the one who ends up paying the price, whether you like it or not.

That’s just the way it works, darling: You step up, or you step aside.

Simple as that.

✦•·············•✦•·············•✦

Location: Billings, Montana
Height: 6’4”

Age: 51
3 kinks: Financial Domination (Soft), Daddy Kink, Sensory Play

✦•·············•✦•·············•✦
